member.summary: A marker class to represent a command.

member.name: T:Tranglo1.CustomerIdentity.IdentityServer.Config
member.summary:
Refer to this : https://leastprivilege.com/2016/12/01/new-in-identityserver4-resource-based-configuration/
In latest IdentityServer4, ApiScope is no longer applicable. We will only deal with and

members.member:
No applicable in IdentityServer4 anymore. Please use "resouces"
TODELETE

member.summary: A base class representing a command or a query. Do not direct inherit from this class. To create a command or query, please use or

member.name: M:Tranglo1.CustomerIdentity.IdentityServer.MediatR.BaseRequest`1.GetAuditLogAsync(`0)
member.summary: Override this function to provide a meaningful audit log message. This function will be called after execution of the command.
member.param: The returned result after this command is executed.
member.returns: Return an audit log message that describing current . Note that the returned message does not need to mention current user's name/email...etc

member.name: T:Tranglo1.CustomerIdentity.IdentityServer.Services.Identity.HttpIdentityContext
member.summary: The lifetime of this implementation is expected to same as , which is Scoped

member.summary: Register implementation of to retrieve current business profile Id submitted from API call.
